The '''V-wing Speeder Transport, Model A''' was a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] used by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to deploy [[V-wing airspeeder]]s from [[Capital ship/Legends|capital]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. Like the V-wing itself, the transport was manufactured by [[Slayn & Korpil/Legends|Slayn & Korpil]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Vwing_egvv.jpg|thumb|left|180px|[[:Category:Technical drawing images|Schematics]] of the [[V-wing airspeeder]] and transport.]]
The Model A was twenty [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long and could carry four [[V-wing airspeeder]]s under its arching wings. These transports were similar in shape to the [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]] they carried, but much larger in size. The V-wings were carried externally, and could be accessed through retractable [[docking sleeve]]s, as they were not sealed for space flight. As such, pilots traveled on board the transport while in space.<ref name="DESB" />

Once the transport reached the upper atmosphere of a [[Planet/Legends|planet]], the V-wing [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] would climb down and strap into their airspeeders. After releasing its V-wings, the transport could return to its mothership to take another group of V-wings or remain in near orbit to await its speeders at a rendezvous point.<ref name="DESB" />

The V-wing transport was unarmed and thus had to depend on starfighters such as [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wings]] for protection.<ref name="TEGTVAV">''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref>

==History==
The Model A was an integral part of the [[V-wing Transport/Combat Speeder team]], an initiative to deploy [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]] to combat zones more quickly. During the [[Battle of Calamari]], Model As were launched from capital ships such as the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Emancipator]]'', which had been captured and put to use by the Republic. They saw action against the [[Transfer essence|resurrected]] [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[World Devastator]]s, [[TIE/D automated starfighter|TIE/D fighters]], and [[AQ-5 Waveskimmer]]s.<ref name="DE">''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]''</ref>
